subcodes.first_line: O thou sagacious one! Praise be to God that thou art the embodiment of these words, for thou hast gained tidings of that Beloved of Whom thou wert once heedless, and from that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شخص خبیر الحمد لله مصداق این کلمه ای زیرا از آن یار بیخبر خبر یافتی و از آن
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
